mapper.select: SELECT student_id, name, age, sex FROM student
SELECT student_id, name, age, sex FROM student WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT student_id, name, age, sex FROM student WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT student_id, name, age, sex FROM student WHERE sex = #{sex}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO student (student_no, name, sex, age, version) VALUES
(#{s.studentNo}, #{s.name}, #{s.sex}, #{s.age}, 0)
